mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO performance_seat_grade (performance_id, section_id, grade, price) VALUES
(#{g.performanceId}, #{g.sectionId}, #{g.grade}, #{g.price})
mapper.select: SELECT psg.*, vs.section_name, vs.section_type, vs.total_rows, vs.seats_per_row FROM performance_seat_grade psg JOIN venue_section vs ON psg.section_id = vs.section_id WHERE psg.performance_id = #{performanceId} ORDER BY vs.display_order
